name: Daredevil
text: Superhuman Senses — Action: Play the top card of the SENSE deck as if it were in your hand (paying its cost). Forced Interrupt: When a [[SENSE]] upgrade would leave play, place it on the bottom of the [[SENSE]] deck instead.

name: Matt Murdock
text: Matt Murdock begins the game with a [[SENSE]] deck. (See rulebook p. 26.) Forced Interrupt: When a [[SENSE] upgrade would leave play, place it on the bottom of the [[SENSE] deck instead.

name: Acute Tactility
text: Attach to an enemy or scheme. Interrupt: When you defeat attached enemy or remove the last threat from attached scheme, discard this card → ready your identity.

name: Enhanced Olfaction
text: Attach to an enemy or scheme. Interrupt: When you defeat attached enemy or remove the last threat from attached scheme, discard this card → reduce the cost of the next card you play this phase by 2.

name: Heightened Hearing
text: Attach to an enemy. Hero Interrupt (defense): When attached enemy attacks, discard this card → that enemy gets -3 ATK for that attack. (You become the target of that attack.)

flavor: The accident that cost Matt his eyesight gave him a new, radar-like sense.
name: Radar Sense
text: Attach to an enemy. Response (attack): After you attack attached enemy, discard this card → deal 3 damage to that enemy.

name: Superior Taste
text: Attach to a scheme. Response (thwart): After you thwart attached scheme, discard this card → remove 2 threat from that scheme.

flavor: "I don't need your protection, Matt."
name: Elektra
text: [star] Forced Interrupt (Hero): When Elektra would take consequential damage, Daredevil takes that damage instead.

flavor: "No further questions, punk." -Daredevil
name: Cross-examination
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 3 damage to an enemy. For each upgrade attached to that enemy, you may deal 1 additional damage to it.

flavor: "Tell us everything."—Matt Murdock
name: Deposition
text: Alter-Ego Action (thwart): You may choose any upgrade from the [[SENSE]] deck and play it, ignoring its resource cost. (Do not shuffle.) Remove 2 threat from a scheme.

flavor: Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump Thump-Thump
name: Living Lie Detector
text: Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. For each upgrade attached to that scheme, you may remove 1 additional threat from it.

flavor: "I cannot see the light. So I will be the light. I am Daredevil, and I am not afraid." -Daredevil
name: Raising Hell
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 2 damage to each enemy for each upgrade attached to that enemy (3 damage instead if Daredevil has the [[AERIAL]] trait).

flavor: "Everything's okay now, Matt! Ol' Fog is on it!"
name: Foggy Nelson
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Foggy Nelson → remove 2 threat from a scheme.

flavor: "What would you boys do without me?"
name: Karen Page
text: Action: Exhaust Karen Page → shuffle 1 Daredevil card from your discard pile into your deck. If you are in alter-ego form, draw 1 card.

flavor: "Let's see them pull off their heist with their vehicle impounded." -Matt Murdock
name: Nelson And Murdock
text: Response: After an [[ATTORNEY]] character or support defeats a side scheme, confuse an enemy.

flavor: As both a Catholic nun and Matt's mother, Sister Maggie often nurses her son back to health.
name: Sister Maggie
text: Matt Murdock gets +3 REC. Response: After you recover, discard a status card from your identity.

name: Daredevil's Billy Club
text: Restricted. Daredevil gets +1 ATK. Hero Action: Return this card to your hand (from play) → choose: • Deal 1 damage to an enemy. • Daredevil gains the [[AERIAL]] trait until the end of the round.

name: The Man Without Fear
text: Hero Action: Exhaust this card and deal 1 damage to Daredevil → choose: • Choose any upgrade from the [[SENSE]] deck and play it, ignoring its resource cost. (Do not shuffle.) • Ready Daredevil.

flavor: "I'm invisible, but I'm still here. Chinatown is where I live and I'm going to protect it."
name: Blindspot
text: [star] Response: After Blindspot thwarts, confuse an enemy with an upgrade attached.

name: Cloak
text: Action: Exhaust Cloak and spend [energy][energy] resources → find Dagger and put her into play. [acceleration]

flavor: "I'll be the light in your dark, Ty."
name: Dagger
text:
Cloak loses each [acceleration] icon.
[star] If Cloak is in play, Dagger takes -1 consequential damage after she uses a basic power.

flavor: My penance stare reveals all of your past sins!
name: Ghost Rider
text: [star] Interrupt: When Ghost Rider attacks an enemy, spend a [lightning] resource ([lightning][lightning] resources instead if that enemy is the villain) → confuse that enemy.

flavor:
"I don't need to see you to know your next move."
-Iron Fist
name: Know Your Enemy
text: [star] Discount 1 ([[MARTIAL ARTIST]]). Hero Action (thwart): Remove 1 threat from a scheme. Remove 1 threat from a scheme.

name: Chance Encounter
text: Attach to a side scheme. Max 1 per scheme. Interrupt: When attached side scheme is defeated, search your deck and discard pile for an ally and add it to your hand. (Shuffle your deck.)

flavor: "You got a permit for that?"-Police officer
name: Legal Trouble
text:
[star] Discount 1 ([[ATTORNEY]] or [[POLICE]]).
Attach to a minion. Max 1 per minion.
Attached minion gets -2 SCH.

name: Move In Shadow
text: Discount 1 ([[MARTIAL ARTIST]] or [[SPY]]). Temporary. Max 1 per player. Response (thwart): After you play a card (including this one), remove 1 threat from a scheme.

name: Stealth Training
text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Response: After you thwart and exactly defeat a side scheme, exhaust Stealth Training → stun an enemy.

name: Stick
text: Interrupt: When a friendly [[MARTIAL ARTIST]] character uses a basic power, choose: • Exhaust Stick → that character gets +1 to that basic power for this use. • That character gets -1 to that basic power for this use. Ready Stick.

name: Contingency Planning
text: Max 1 per player. You may play the upgrade tucked here as if it were in your hand. Action: Choose 1 upgrade in your hand that can attach to a minion or side scheme. Tuck that upgrade under here (to a maximum of 1).

name: Dance With The Devil
text: Team-Up (Daredevil and Elektra). Max 1 per deck. Attach to an enemy. Hero Action (attack): Discard this card → deal 3 damage to attached enemy.

name: Echo
text: Watch and Learn — Response: After a player plays an aspect or basic event, tuck that event under here from that player's discard pile. Then, if there are more than 3 tucked cards here, discard all but 3 of those cards.

flavor: Maya can recreate any physical movement she sees.
name: Maya Lopez
text: Practice Makes Perfect — Interrupt: When you change to hero form, search your deck for an aspect or basic event and add it to your hand. (Shuffle.)

flavor: KTINK!
name: Innate Reflexes
text:
Starting. (You may add this card to your hand before drawing your starting hand.)
Your hero gets +1 DEF.

flavor: "Follow my lead."
name: Daredevil
text: [star] Response: After Daredevil uses a basic power, reduce the cost of the next event you play this round by 1.

name: Photographic Reflexes
text: [star] If you are in hero form, you can discard Photographic Reflexes from your hand to play an event tucked under Echo as if it were in your hand. Reduce the cost to play that event by 2. You cannot trigger Echo's "Watch and Learn" ability for that event.

flavor: "I watch tape after tape to train for a fight." -Echo
name: Study The Tape
text: Action: Search any player's discard pile for 1 aspect event, 1 basic event, or 1 copy of Photographic Reflexes and add that card to your hand.

flavor: The Rez is not a real reservation or Native nation, but a place for all tribes.
name: The Rez
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust The Rez → heal X damage from Maya Lopez, where X is the highest cost among cards tucked under her.

flavor:
<Need help?>"-Echo
*Translated from ASL.
name: American Sign Language
text: Hero Resource: Exhaust this card → generate a [wild] resource for an event being played by any player.

flavor: Maya uses her physical gifts to express herself in dance.
name: Choreography
text: Action: Exhaust this card → shuffle 1 aspect or basic event from your discard pile into your deck. If you are in alter-ego form, draw 1 card.

name: Echo's Katana
text: Restricted. Hero Response (attack): After you play an event, exhaust Echo's Katana → deal damage to an enemy equal to that event's printed cost. This attack gains piercing.

name: Improvisation
text: Hero Response: After you play an event, if it has the following traits: • [[ATTACK]] - heal 1 damage from Echo. • [[DEFENSE]] - remove 1 threat from a scheme. • [[THWART]] - deal 1 damage to an enemy.

flavor: "I absorb an arsenal of actions, so when I need to, I can perform them with the same precision." -Echo
name: Muscle Memory
text: Hero Action: Exhaust this card → add an event tucked under Echo to your hand.

flavor: "Two versus one is not a fair fight...for you." -Daredevil
name: Army Of One
text: [star] Increase the cost to play this card by 1 for each ally you control. Hero Action: Ready your hero.

flavor:
"I think we made 'em mad."
"What do you mean 'we'?"
-Rocket Raccoon and Gamora
name: Get Their Attention
text: Hero Interrupt (defense/thwart): When an enemy initiates an attack, remove 3 threat from a scheme.

name: In Harm's Way
text: [star] Increase the cost to play this card by 1 for each ally you control. Hero Action (attack/thwart): Deal X damage to an enemy and remove X threat from a scheme, where X is your DEF.

flavor: "That was my favorite shirt!" -Luke Cage
name: Powerful Punch
text: Hero Interrupt (attack/defense): When an enemy initiates an attack, deal 4 damage to that enemy.

name: The Best Offense...
text: Temporary. Your hero gets +1 DEF. Use your DEF in place of your THW and ATK. (Ignore any modifiers to your THW and ATK.)

flavor: "I am Ronin, the samurai with no master." -Ronin
name: Ronin
text: While you do not control any allies, your hero gets +1 DEF and gains retaliate 1.

name: Stand Alone
text: Max 1 per player. Hero Interrupt: When an enemy attacks you (before any defender is declared), if you do not control any allies, exhaust Stand Alone → ready your hero.

name: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
text: Team-Up (Daredevil and Echo). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action (attack/thwart): Choose 2 of the following (you may choose the same option twice): • Deal 3 damage to an enemy. • Remove 3 threat from a scheme.

name: Energy
text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Genius
text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Strength
text: Max 1 per deck.
